Which statement about plant and animals cells is true?
facts.truth: Both use mitochondria to produce energy.
distractors: Both have a cell wall to give them support.
Both have a large vacuole to store water.
Both use chloroplasts to store energy.

facts.context: The first stage of soil formation is the weathering of rock into fine particles. To make a good soil for growing plants, which would be best to add to the rock particles?
Which of these is a structure that is present in all organisms?
Small grasshoppers shed their outer covering as they grow larger. Which animal also sheds its outer covering as it grows larger?

One year a farmer decided not to plant crops in one of his fields. During that year his farm received a greater amount of precipitation than normal. Which will most likely occur in that unplanted field as a result of the greater precipitation?
facts.truth: erosion of topsoil will increase in the field
distractors: more carbon dioxide will be trapped in the field
invasive species will inhabit the field
animals will dig burrows in the field

facts.context: Use the information below to answer the question. The human body is composed of different systems made of specialized cells, tissues, and organs. Each of these structures has a specific function that aids in the survival of the human species. Which organs are used in reproduction?

What is the main function of the chloroplasts in plant cells?
distractors: to allow the plant to reproduce

facts.context: Which characteristic of a cold-water upwelling near the coast of Northern California results in a large concentration of marine organisms?
Which statement describes a primary function of the cell wall of a plant cell?
facts.truth: The cell wall provides structural support.

facts.context: Andre learned that plants survive through a process called photosynthesis. Which substance do plants produce during photosynthesis?
For years, scientists have classified plants according to their characteristics. Which most likely has led scientists to better identify and discover new species of plants?
facts.truth: advances in the study of DNA

The nucleus contains DNA. Which statement best describes how DNA controls the working of the cell?
distractors: It regulates traffic in and out of the cell.

facts.truth: Organic matter is decayed in the soil.
